title: Player Companions
description: Player Companions adds additional creatures which will follow, protect or help you.
body:
# 🐾 Player Companions

[![Player Companions Downloads](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_552456_downloads.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/player-companions) [![Player Companions Versions](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/Minecraft_552456_all.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/player-companions)

![Player Companions](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/483/364/player_companions.gif)

Player Companions adds companion creatures that can travel with you and support you on your journey.

## Important Notice for 7.x

Player Companions **7.x is a beta** and a **complete rewrite** of the mod.

Please keep the following in mind before updating:

- **7.x is not compatible with 6.x or older versions**
- **Old companion data is not guaranteed to work**
- **Existing companions from older versions may be lost after updating**
- **Always create a full backup before testing or updating**

For important saves, servers, or modpacks, testing in a separate instance is strongly recommended.

## ✨ Current 7.x Beta Features

Currently available in the 7.x beta:

- Pig companion
- Rooster companion
- Small Slime companion

The current beta is intentionally limited while the new foundation is being rebuilt.

## 🔄 Legacy Note

Older 6.x versions included a larger feature set and additional companion systems.

Some of these features may return later, but the current 7.x branch should be treated as a new generation of the mod.

## 🐞 Reporting Problems

If you find an issue during beta testing, please include:

- the exact mod version
- the Minecraft version
- the loader you use
- clear reproduction steps
- logs or crash reports if available

GitHub Issues:

➡️ https://github.com/MarkusBordihn/BOs-Player-Companions/issues
